summary: Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering student with a strong foundation in networking concepts, system configuration, and network security. Hands-on experience in designing network topologies, configuring routing and switching, and troubleshooting connectivity issues using industry-standard tools. Currently focused on developing practical skills in network infrastructure and security, and seeking an opportunity to begin a career in network administration.

education.coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Databases, Computer Networks, Microprocessors

experience.title: Cisco Virtual Internship Programme
bullets: Gained hands-on knowledge of computer networking fundamentals, including IP addressing, subnetting, routing, and switching concepts.
Explored AI and automation concepts in networking, including intelligent network management and basic machine learning applications
Enhanced ability to apply theoretical networking concepts to practical scenarios and understand industry-standard best practices.

projects.name: Task Management Web App
bullets: Developed a full-stack task management application with CRUD functionality.
Implemented user authentication using JWT and secure session handling.
Designed responsive UI using modern React practices.

projects.name: REST API Backend
bullets: Built RESTful APIs to handle data operations and client-server communication.
Tested endpoints and ensured proper error handling and validation.
Explored integration of external APIs for extended functionality.
